calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-27-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Alberta L. Turner, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Gregory Raymond Jones Jr., was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Gregory Raymond Turner.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-16-2005 Reset To Sep-27-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias. CSR: Leticia A. Perez.
Petitioner: Alberta Lavonne Turner, present, in pro per.
Proof of Service is defective and the matter is continued to 9/27/05.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-05-2005 Reset To Aug-16-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Petitioner: Alberta Lavonne Turner, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Gregory Raymond Jones, Jr., was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Aug. 16, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-22-2005 Off Calendar
